name: Diadem Pickleball Complex Jensen Beach
description: Come play pickleball at Diadem Pickleball Complex Jensen Beach in Jensen Beach, FL! There are 8 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, adaptive programming, water, restrooms, food, and wheelchair accessibility. Reservations are available. The courts are free.

name: Elisabeth Lahti Library Park
description: Come play pickleball at Elisabeth Lahti Library Park in Indiantown, FL! There is 1 outdoor hard court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Players have access to restrooms and water. The court is free.

name: Halpatiokee Park Tennis Center
description: Great courts with open play every morning and evening.

name: Langford Park
description: Come play pickleball at Langford Park in Jensen Beach, FL! There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights, water, and restrooms.

name: North River Shores Tennis Club
description: North River Shores Tennis Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Stuart, FL. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms, water, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, food, youth programming, and trainers or lessons. Reservations are available.

name: Powerhouse Gym Stuart
description: Enjoy reserved or open play on new Har-Tru coated courts.  Individual and group lessons are available.  All pickleball members have access to locker rooms with showers, sauna and steam rooms as well as a pro shop and smoothie bar.

name: South County Ball Park
description: Come play pickleball at South County Ball Park in Hobe Sound, FL! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: South River Condominiums
description: South River Condominiums is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Stuart, FL. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. The courts are private.

name: Stuart Yacht & Country Club
description: Stuart Yacht & Country Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Stuart, FL. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like a pro shop or equipment store, restrooms, and water. A membership is required to play.

name: William G. "Doc" Myers Park
description: William G. "Doc" Myers Park is a place to play pickleball in Hobe Sound, FL. There are 6 outdoor concrete and hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Wojcieszak Park
description: Wojcieszak Park is a place to play pickleball in Stuart, FL. There is 1 outdoor hard court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The court is free.

name: YMCA of the Treasure Coast
description: Come play pickleball at YMCA of the Treasure Coast in Stuart, FL! There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The courts can be reserved. Amenities include food, restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.
